title: Grilled Padron Peppers with Smoked Paprika Aioli
description: A simple yet flavorful German-inspired side dish featuring smoky grilled Padron peppers served with a side of creamy smoked paprika aioli for dipping.
instructions: Brush the peppers with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the peppers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until blistered and slightly charred.
Meanwhile, mix together smoked paprika, garlic, lemon juice, and mayonnaise in a bowl.
Once the peppers are done, let them cool slightly before serving with the smoked paprika aioli for dipping.
